_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Discharge summary of recent PCNL done

claim.label: Clinical notes mentioning the drugs provided

ppd_preauth.q: Discharge summary mentioning the date of the pervious surgery and the follow up date provided?
Has the patient previously undergone PCNL?

cpd_claim.q: X-ray / USG post procedure showing the procedure done (Only once) provided?
Clinical notes mentioning the procedure done and the drugs provided?

common_queries: Discharge summary of previous PCNL surgery not provided or date of previous surgery / follow-up date missing at pre-authorization
Patient has not previously undergone PCNL
X-ray / USG post procedure not provided or provided more than once at claim submission
Urine routine report missing at claim submission
Clinical notes mentioning the procedure done and drugs provided missing at claim submission
